rationale: 5.4yr cloud/Android/Java engineer with self-learner AI exposure only; skills are YOLO, Webpack, Figma, and Content Writing with no production IR, embeddings, or ranking experience, and a role at fictional Dunder Mifflin signals a honeypot profile.

2.4yr QA Engineer entirely at Mindtree (IT services) with no production ML or retrieval work; the implausibly long Semantic Search skill listing (59mo advanced) on a QA profile with no supporting career evidence reads as keyword inflation.

Entirely non-technical career spanning customer support, brand design, and operations management at fictional companies (Initech, Wayne Enterprises) with no engineering or ML work beyond surface-level AI curiosity.

5.6yr data engineer at InMobi (AdTech product company) with lightweight ML experience (XGBoost/sklearn for clustering and churn) and 16mo of Semantic Search exposure, but no production IR/retrieval/ranking system ownership and no embedding or vector-search experience.
3yr Cloud Engineer entirely at Accenture doing frontend/API work with skills limited to Microservices, Figma, Accounting, Hadoop, and Six Sigma — zero ML, NLP, retrieval, or ranking experience.

5.3yr ML engineer at Netflix (content recommendation system with sentence-transformer embeddings at 10M+ users scale) and Adobe (production MLflow/Kubeflow pipelines); expert-level skills in pgvector, Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, Fine-tuning LLMs, and PyTorch from IIIT Bangalore (tier_1) — directly covers production hybrid retrieval and embedding systems required by the role.
12.2yr career entirely in non-technical roles (marketing, operations, sales, civil engineering) at TCS and Wipro with a fictional company (Initech) and no engineering or ML work whatsoever.

NLP Engineer at Nykaa (e-commerce product company) who owned the ranking layer for a search product, evolving it from hand-tuned scoring to a learning-to-rank model, and designed a relevance labeling pipeline; advanced skills in Sentence Transformers, Hugging Face Transformers, and Fine-tuning LLMs with NIT Warangal (tier_1) education directly align with the role's IR and ranking requirements.

9.7yr non-technical career in sales, project management, and customer support at fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Pied Piper) with no engineering or ML background despite marketing-manager summary language.

9.1yr career as an accountant, HR manager, and customer support lead at fictional companies (Stark Industries, Initech, Wayne Enterprises) with zero engineering depth; Reinforcement Learning listed as advanced (50mo) is implausible keyword inflation given the entirely non-technical work history.
